revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[清和源氏]][[源頼季|頼季]]流[[井上氏]]の一族[[丹波赤井氏]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:日本の氏族]] [[Category:井上氏]] {...'
revision.text:
[[清和源氏]][[源頼季|頼季]]流[[井上氏]]の一族[[丹波赤井氏]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:日本の氏族]] [[Category:井上氏]] {{DEFAULTSORT:あかいし}}
[[清和源氏]][[源頼季|頼季]]流[[井上氏]]の一族[[丹波赤井氏]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:あかいし たんは}} [[Category:井上氏]] [[Category:江戸幕府旗本の氏族]]
[[清和源氏]][[源頼季|頼季]]流[[井上氏]]の一族[[赤井氏|丹波赤井氏]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:あかいし たんは}} [[Category:井上氏]] [[Category:江戸幕府旗本の氏族]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Merge [[Category:丹波 Province clans]] into [[Category:Clans of Tanba Province]] via bot
Merge [[Category:江戸幕府旗本の氏族]] into [[Category:Hatamoto Clans of the Edo Shogunate]] via bot
Merge [[Category:井上氏]] into [[Category:Inoue Clan]] via bot
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:丹波赤井氏]] to [[Category:Akai Clan of Tanba Province]]: Merge [[Category:丹波赤井氏]] into [[Category:Akai Clan of Tanba Province]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9551175)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[清和源氏]][[源頼季|頼季]]流[[井上氏]]の一族{{Catmore}}
{{citation needed|あかいし たんは}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|あかいし たんは}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:丹波赤井氏}} {{translated page|ja|Category:丹波赤井氏|version=64128836}} {{translated page|ja|丹波赤井氏|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:丹波赤井氏|comment=did a replacement}} [[ja:Category:丹波赤井氏]] [[ko:Category:단바 아카이씨]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:信濃山口氏]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[zh:Category:丹波赤井氏]] {{wikidata link|Q9551175}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Clans of Tanba Province]] [[Category:Hatamoto Clans of the Edo Shogunate]] [[Category:Inoue Clan]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]]
